caption: A man with dark hair and a beard, wearing a black t-shirt, is positioned in front of a computer monitor during a live stream. The screen displays a random name generator from "RANDOM.ORG" with a list of numbered names, including "Carl Hagedorn" and "Michael Loguericio," alongside a chat window featuring messages from "glowbug27" and "Nightbot." The Nightbot message reads, "Click the link for the BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE! >>> https://bit.ly/2SdeS4K9." Below the list, text states, "Don't use this service for giveaways! Use Multi-Round Giveaways instead." At the bottom of the monitor, the "JASPYS" and "CASEBREAKS.COM" logos are visible. The man remains relatively still, looking toward the screen, while the on-screen text fluctuates slightly; specifically, the text "You have randomized this list 3 times" changes to "You have randomized this list 4 times."
